Xử lý lỗi hỏng chữ hoa chữ thường trên h: How to fix uppercase and lowercase letter errors on the Android operating system?
PC Windows coi đường dẫn hoa hay thường: Windows PCs consider paths with uppercase or lowercase letters as the same, but Android considers them different.
